name: io.github.sairam0424/mindforge
description: Read the MindForge engine from any MCP host: query the knowledge graph, find related memory, check project health, and read the audit log (plus a guarded memory write).

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the project whose .mindforge/ and .planning/ the server reads. Defaults to the current working directory if unset.
